sentences.english: I learned to cook from YouTube videos.
I just followed recipes step by step until I got better.
sentences.korean: 단계별로 레시피를 따라하다 보니 실력이 늘었어요.

sentences.english: My grandmother taught me everything I know about cooking.
sentences.korean: 할머니가 요리에 대해 아는 모든 걸 가르쳐주셨어요.

sentences.english: She never used recipes — everything was by feel.
sentences.korean: 레시피를 안 쓰셨어요 — 모든 게 감이었어요.

sentences.english: I took a cooking class last year and it was worth every penny, especially the knife skills.
sentences.korean: 작년에 요리 수업을 들었고 값어치를 했어요. 특히 칼 기술이요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
